rankingFactors.whyItMatters: The site surfaces weekly demand directly in cards and detail pages.
Repo trust is the strongest cross-platform cold-start asset.

rankingFactors.evidence: Resolved security breakdown for 37/38 items, average 65.4/100
rankingFactors.whyItMatters: Trust & Identity, Behavioral Monitoring, and Vulnerability Exposure are explicit review surfaces.

rankingFactors.evidence: Developer 14; General Utility 12; Productivity & Workspace 3; Office Documents 3; Search & Research 2
rankingFactors.whyItMatters: The strongest skills describe a single job-to-be-done in plain language.
Visible installation across multiple agent distributions reinforces portability and trust.
Multi-skill repo owners compound trust and discovery over time.

commonPatterns: 高周下载技能都非常强调任务边界和直接产出。
强 repo 信任和清晰描述会显著提升冷启动效率。
安全信号完整的技能更适合长期复用和企业采纳。
